STYLE_GUIDE.md.summary: Markdown style guide defining shadcn-inspired UI rules, forbidding gradients, and giving implementation hints for the coding agent.

index.html.summary: Full HTML file for the Game of Life app with updated restart text to 100 generations and the same larger board layout.

script.js.summary: Full JavaScript file for the Game of Life app with the auto-restart limit changed to 100 generations and the existing board sizing behavior preserved.

styles.css.summary: Full stylesheet for the Game of Life app with a larger board area and slightly tighter surrounding layout so the simulation canvas appears bigger on screen.
